title: An Epstein Associate Steps Down From Japanese Government Tech Project
author: River Akira Davis and Hisako Ueno
fullText: Joichi Ito’s involvement in a publicly funded Japanese initiative had come under scrutiny after new details revealed his close relationship with Jeffrey Epstein.
summary: Joichi Ito’s involvement in a publicly funded Japanese initiative had come under scrutiny after new details revealed his close relationship with Jeffrey Epstein.
